title: Horror Ambience
description: This resource will add a scary or creepy ambience, perfect for horror modpacks
body:
Step into a darker, more immersive world of horror.
Horror Corner – Sound Enhancement Pack completely redefines the audio atmosphere of your modpack, giving every step, every creak, and every distant whisper a chilling sense of realism.

This pack was carefully designed to capture the tension, the emptiness, and the dread that define a true horror experience. Every sound has been digitally reworked to enhance immersion without breaking the original Minecraft feel.

What’s Inside:
- New Ambient Sounds: Dynamic and environmental soundscapes that change the mood of every biome and location. From quiet forests that whisper to abandoned caves that breathe darkness.
- Block Sound Overhaul: Every block interaction feels heavier, more natural, and more unsettling. Wood creaks, stone echoes, and glass cracks with haunting resonance.
- Reimagined Mob Sounds: Hostile creatures now sound truly alive – or rather, undead. From low growls to eerie distant cries, you’ll never feel safe again.

Compatibility & Purpose
This pack was made as a companion for Horror Corner Modpack, but it can be used standalone with any horror-themed experience. It is optimized for Minecraft 1.20+ and works smoothly alongside most visual and ambient enhancement mods.

Notes from the Creator
This project is considered complete. No major updates are planned unless the community’s interest grows significantly. Still, feedback is always welcome – your support helps shape future creations.

To everyone who downloads, shares, or just tries this out — thank you.
You keep the spirit of horror alive.
Enjoy the fear. Embrace the silence. And don’t look back.
